column3: Click to the `Update requests` icon on the Admin dashboard

column4: You will see a list of records

column3: Filter the results by `Open` and select any status except `Accepted`

column4: You will see a list of records, each with a button "View Update (Finished)"

column3: Click the "View Update" button next to one of the records

column4: a new browser tab opens, titled `Update request ...`

column3: Check the current status of the application

column4: if the status is not accepted, the `Mark as full review` checkbox in the left side is not visible
if the status is accepted, the `Mark as full review` checkbox in the left side is visible

column3: Select the status as `Accepted` in Change Status

column4: The checkbox `Mark as full review` in the side panel is visible

column3: Click on the `Mark as full review` checkbox

column4: The checkbox `Mark as full review` is filled
a new note will be added to the application
It will have the message "Last full review completed on {date} by `{username}`"
your username and user id will be shown on that note
the date and time you save the application will be shown

column3: Search for the journal and click on edit

column4: The last full review date is saved in the associated journal
a new note will be added to the journal
It will have the message "Last full review completed on {date} by `{username}`"
your username and user id will be shown on that note
the date and time you save the application will be shown
